protocols.Paper_title: High-transition-temperature paraffin integration in IFAST device for efficient and robust nucleic acid extraction and detection
protocols.Evidence: Table lists Rodriguez-Mateos et al. with Tween-20 in lysis buffer, a Tween wash buffer, and on-chip gentle mixing.

protocols.Paper_title: High-transition-temperature paraffin integration in IFAST device for efficient and robust nucleic acid extraction and detection
protocols.Evidence: Table lists Mosley et al. with no wash buffer and on-chip gentle mixing.

protocols.Paper_title: High-transition-temperature paraffin integration in IFAST device for efficient and robust nucleic acid extraction and detection
protocols.Evidence: Table lists Kistrup et al. with Triton X-100 in lysis buffer and off-chip lysis; text mentions subsequent washing steps.

protocols.Paper_title: High-transition-temperature paraffin integration in IFAST device for efficient and robust nucleic acid extraction and detection
protocols.Evidence: Table lists Juang et al. with Triton X-100 in lysis buffer, ethanol wash buffer, and off-chip lysis.

protocols.Paper_title: High-transition-temperature paraffin integration in IFAST device for efficient and robust nucleic acid extraction and detection
protocols.Evidence: Present work lists Tween-20 lysis buffer, ethanol/Tween wash buffer, heating, and RNA extraction with RT-LAMP or RT-qPCR readout.

protocols.Paper_title: High-transition-temperature paraffin integration in IFAST device for efficient and robust nucleic acid extraction and detection
protocols.Evidence: Gentle-buffer condition used low surfactant lysis without heat treatment; extraction output was quantified by RT-qPCR.

protocols.Paper_title: High-transition-temperature paraffin integration in IFAST device for efficient and robust nucleic acid extraction and detection
protocols.Evidence: Intensive-buffer condition used high surfactant lysis without heat treatment; RNA concentration was quantified by RT-qPCR.

protocols.Paper_title: High-transition-temperature paraffin integration in IFAST device for efficient and robust nucleic acid extraction and detection
protocols.Evidence: Intensive buffers were combined with heat treatment for on-chip RNA extraction; recovery was assessed by RT-qPCR.

protocols.Paper_title: High-transition-temperature paraffin integration in IFAST device for efficient and robust nucleic acid extraction and detection
protocols.Evidence: Integrated device combined thermal lysis, washing, elution/detection, and colorimetric RT-LAMP detection.
